reasoning: The Lean statement faithfully captures the informal claim. The indexed family `X : ι → Type*` with `[∀ i, TopologicalSpace (X i)]` corresponds to the family $\{X_\alpha\}$, `Π i, X i` with Mathlib's `Pi.topologicalSpace` is the standard product topology, and `NormalSpace` is the standard definition (disjoint closed sets have disjoint open neighborhoods). The hypothesis `∀ i, Nonempty (X i)` matches "each $X_\alpha$ is nonempty", `NormalSpace (Π i, X i)` matches "$\prod X_\alpha$ is normal", and the conclusion `∀ i, NormalSpace (X i)` matches "so is $X_\alpha$" (i.e., each factor is normal). Hypotheses, conclusion, types, and quantifier structure all align.
